hotel_name: Khách sạn Harmony Hạ Long (HARMONY HALONG HOTEL)

reviews.title: Unfriendly receptionist & flooding bathroom & noisy area
reviews.text:
I’d been several times in that hotel. Overall, it was ok for the price but my last experience was horrible. I had to deal with a very nosey and unfriendly receptionist and above all, after each shower, the bathroom was flooded. I asked the receptionist to help me with the issue, he took 2 hours and at the end, nothing. He sent me to another room with more issues. Besides, it was noisy and unbearable activities at schools just behind the hotel starting at 7am on Saturday and Sunday.
I wouldn’t recommend it.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: the property was very spooky and dirty! our room has two dead cockroaches

reviews.title: Đánh giá khách sạn
reviews.text: Khách sạn ở vị trí trung tâm, thuận lợi, sạch sẽ và nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location was really good but they are building a large hotel that will affect the view
reviews.negatives: We had a few ants

reviews.title: Deteriorating equipment
reviews.text:
Advantages: Clean hotel, friendly staff, spacious lobby, small but acceptable parking space.  
Disadvantages: Very poor hot water, only slightly warm, sink drainage is poor, the door only has a curtain that blocks light, there are no sheer curtains, so if you want to open the door without too much light or still want privacy, you can't do it.

reviews.title: Good value for the accommodation!
reviews.positives: Location was great, Rome were big
reviews.negatives: No AC on common areas

reviews.title: halong bay marathon
reviews.text: Good hotel. easy to find. location near the convention center where the race starts and finishes.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I had a very pleasant stay at Harmony Hotel. The room felt like a studio apartment—spacious, clean, and comfortable, much better than I expected. The daily cleaning service was excellent; every morning, the room was tidied up and fresh towels were provided. What stood out the most was the staff. The receptionists spoke English well, which made communication smooth, and they were always professional, polite, and ready to help with anything I needed. The housekeeping ladies were also incredibly kind, warm, and attentive. Their friendliness truly made the stay feel more welcoming. Overall, I would rate my experience 5 out of 5.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.text: This hotel were very nice and the environment was great. The room was clean and spacious. Value for money.

reviews.title: Marvelous 😍
reviews.positives: All About it is very good.
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Simple but clean rooms with strong water pressure. No restaurant on site but there are cafes and restos nearby. The smaller bed on a triple room was very hard though. Staff are also pleasant and check-in was quick. Overall, very good value for money.

reviews.title: Good value for money especially if travelling with family
reviews.positives:
Nice clean apartment .Central and had enough room for all my sons and me to stay there.

Coffee shops everywhere around for breakfast.
reviews.negatives: Nothing really good value for money

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Worthy of the money spent, the hotel is clean and new, and the staff is very enthusiastic; it's only a 5-minute walk from the museum.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
It look prettier than their photos.
Everything meets our expectations.
reviews.negatives:
There is a smart TV but no subscriptions (no Netflix, no YouTube).
Those can be improved.

reviews.title: This hotel is great
reviews.text: It’s located near many local restaurants. The room is clean and comfortable. The staffs are friendly. The receptionist booked a Ha long bay tour for me. It’s awesome.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good location. Accommodating staff
reviews.negatives:
Leaking bathroom sink
Some guests are smoking. I can smell the smoke in my room and along the corridors.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is located right in the center of Hon Gai, very suitable for those who want to go on a food tour in Ha Long. It's convenient to move to any dining spot. I forgot to take pictures of the room, which is spacious and fully equipped, with a kitchen and utensils for families. There are 2 separate bedrooms. I requested to store my luggage before check-in, and the hotel happily kept it for me. The receptionist is friendly and humorous. If I get the chance to take friends to Ha Long again, I will probably book here again because the price is cheap and fits my travel schedule. Wishing the hotel many guests!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great location not near the main road, quiet and peaceful neighborhood. Great value and spacious room
reviews.negatives:
The spring mattress was sliding on the bed frame, the sheets weren't perfectly clean, and the shower hose was little damaged but worked.
The smart tv wasn't smart enough so couldn't cast from my phone, and it had only VN channels.
These were the only nitpicks I had

I liked how here is a master switch near the bed so you don’t have to get up to shut the lights —- walking distance from the water and lots of shops and stores

reviews.title: Harmony Hotel
reviews.text: I really like it. The location is very convenient, everything is close by. There is a spa called Mộc on the right side of the hotel, it's affordable and of good quality. The hotel is clean and beautiful, the front desk staff are friendly and pleasant. I would give it a perfect score with no complaints.

reviews.title: Hotel is a 10, halong bay tour maybe a 3
reviews.positives: The place is awesome, the staff helpful, and it has a great value.
reviews.negatives: Even though they were really nice getting me the tour to Halong bay, there were several problems with that tour(that doesn't belong to the hotel) , starting from the rude guide, the staff were not so nice either, they offer a plan but just completed partially, and you have to pay any time you need ices even you pay already over price drinks.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.text: This is a very nice hotel. Nice room, nice shower, everything clean, friendly and helpful staff.. this is what a hotel should be like. We really enjoyed our stay here, and we highly recommend it.

reviews.positives: Hotel facilities were great. Our room was very clean and cozy. The bed was huge. Staffs were very accomodating with our luggage. Come back for sure!

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.positives: Great hotel in Halong

reviews.title: Conveniently located hotel.
reviews.text: Convenient location, clean rooms, fully equipped. Suitable for the price.

reviews.title: I highly recommend this hotel! It was clean, quiet and most of all friendly and helpful staff!
reviews.positives: The staff who was working the time I was there was super helpful and nice. I needed a towel for the beach since it was our last day in town and he took me to the store to buy one however, helped  I didn’t have enough yen (to pay for it and he offered to help pay, (of course I paid him back). He also brought my mother and I to the hop on and hop off stop and waited with us until the bus arrived. I don’t remember his name but he was super helpful and friendly. Excellent service from the staff. I enjoyed our one night stay. I would definitely come back to stay when i visit again. Thank you for a wonderful experience at the hotel. Coffee place down at the corner serves delicious coffee and as well friendly young staff!

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Convenient location, friendly staff, clean and fully equipped rooms. A choice that matches the price.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff went above and beyond to help us book a cruise on Halong bay. Awesome people!

reviews.title: Best hotel
reviews.text: I stayed in 3 hotels at this area, this hotel is the best when it comes to cleanliness, staff friendly and welcoming, location, price etc..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I like everything about the hotel , the staff are so nice and friendly , speak very good English anything you need they are here to help you out. Thank you for the stay would highly recommend to anyone who comes to halong bay , there organization our trip for us and made sure we got back to the hotel,  very nice staff 😀

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: ok

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean, good location, good prices and staffs are very friendly and helpful
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text:
Me and my family stayed here for a few nights during the off season (early January) it was very clean, in a good location and fantastic value. Breakfast wasn't open but we didn't expect it to be and the location was close enough to cafe/eateries.
They organised a taxi to the airport for my sister and held our bags free of charge for the day.
Would stay again next time I am in Halong

reviews.title: Muy mala experiencia
reviews.negatives: Teníamos un transfer a las 8 de la mañana para ir a Hanoi y un señor de la recepción a las 7:15 nos llamo  a la puerta de la habitación increpando y diciendo que el transporte estaba ya abajo esperando que nos diéramos prisa. El señor, sin hablar inglés, muy mal educado, casi nos saca de la habitación a la fuerza. Todavía quedaban 45 minutos para la hora acordada y tuvimos que salir corriendo del hotel. Comunico el incidente al hotel y este solo me contesta con una frase de disculpa, sin más. Las formas como nos saco de la habitación y nos increpó no son normales para un hotel de esta categoría. Muy mala experiencia. No recomiendo para nada este hotel.

reviews.title: Worth to stay
reviews.text:
The room is clean, nice and new.
They have a large reception floor and the motorbikes are always ready.

reviews.title: Aceptable
reviews.positives: El Hotel está muy bien, la ubicación, es limpio y por el precio no se puede pedir más. Halong bah no es mas que para un noche
reviews.negatives: Dice que tiene desayuno y restaurante y no hay ninguna de las dos cosas

reviews.title: Clean - Convenient
reviews.text: New, high-end room interior with full amenities. Clean and comfortable. Friendly staff. Hotel located in the center. Surrounded by many conveniences.

reviews.title: Funcional, bien localizado y a un precio muy conveniente.
reviews.positives: La ubicación es excelente, pues está a doscientros metros de la costa donde se aprecian muy cercanas las magníficas formaciones rocosas de la Bahía. Dado que está a la altura del Centro de Convenciones, se puede aprovechar lo que allí ocurra. Cuando estuvimos se desarrollaban ahí y en su entorno una feria de productos locales y un mercado de flores y se estaba preparando la festividad del año nuevo lunar. En sus alrededores inmediantos hay una amplia oferta culinaria, comercial y cultural (el museo de Quang Ninh, por ejemplo). También está cercano a varios atractivos, a los que se puede llegar caminando, como playa (a unos 3k), mercados locales, centros comerciales e incluso la terminal 1 del teleférico y la Pagoda adyacente, que valen totalmente la pena visitar (4,5 km desde el hotel, con subida escarpada en los últimos quinientos metros, aunque hay más de una camino para llegar allí). De cualquier manera, caminar o trotar por la costanera de Ha Long Bay (unos 7 kilómetros) es, por si solo, un placer y una experiencia única..

reviews.title: TOO GOOD FOR AN EXPERIENCE
reviews.text: THE HOTEL IS CLEAN, NEAT, AND CONVENIENT FOR ACCESS TO HON GAI. I WILL DEFINITELY RETURN. THE RECEPTIONIST IS WARM AND HELPFUL IN MEETING ALL THE GUESTS' ROOM REQUIREMENTS.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Perdí mi maleta en el aeropuerto. Ellos gestionaron todo el asunto con el staff del aeropuerto y me la encontraron. La habitación genial por espacio, limpieza y calidad. No entiendo que tenga 3 estrellas, creo que podría tener una más.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Excelente
reviews.positives: Nos ascendieron de categoría de habitación gratuitamente, el personal fue súper amable. La habitación era muy espaciosa, con balcón y muy limpia. Lo mismo para el baño. La ubicación también es ideal.
reviews.negatives: Por poner alguna pega, aunque las sábanas estaban limpias, tenían algunas manchas.

reviews.title: New, hassle-free and good value for money
reviews.text: If you were looking for a good, 2-star accommodation in Hong Hai ward, Hon Gai, this hotel is a good choice. Newly-built (2023), in a good, not busy location and within walking distance to local restaurants nearby. Staff are super nice. Rooms are clean with nice furniture and modern bathroom facilities. It's a good value for money. Recommended for budget travelers!

reviews.title: Excelente
reviews.positives:
Todo muy bonito y un excelente trato de ~Lâm Nguyễn que es el de recepción nos sirvió de muchísimo sus consejos  y nos consiguió traslados a otras ciudades al igual que tours , todo perfecto ❤️

Everything was very nice and the service was excellent from ~Lâm Nguyễn, who is at the reception desk. Her advice was very helpful and she got us transfers to other cities as well as tours. Everything was perfect ❤️

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good to use. Clean. The staff is very friendly and cheerful. The staff is also pretty and smiles brightly. Therefore, it is reasonable to come and rest.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is located opposite the QN museum. It is quite close to the dolphin entertainment center. The square is 3km away from Hòn Gai beach. The rooms are clean, and the view from the balcony area is very nice and chill. The reception staff and cleaning ladies are very thoughtful, enthusiastic, and cheerful. My family is very satisfied with staying here and has recommended it to friends. 👍 I prefer staying in HG over BC as it is more peaceful for sleeping and the food is fresh and delicious. We've been to HL for two years now and still love it. 👌

reviews.title: Excelente hotel y personal muy amable
reviews.positives: El recepcionista muy amable, profesional y servicial. El hotel está bien ubicado, cómodo, muy limpio.

reviews.title: Beautiful cheap room.
reviews.text: The room is fully equipped. Clean, beautiful, and super affordable. Next time I will take my family and book again.

reviews.text: Có một sự thất vọng khi mình đặt phòng có giường lớn và khách sạn bố trí 2c giường đơn ghép lại. Cảm giác như bị lừa. Trải nhiệm thực sự rất tệ khi nằm phải phần giữa 2 chiếc giường. Cộm lưng và khó chịu vô cùng. Chỉ có nhân viên là dễ chịu.

reviews.title: Point de chute pour la baie d along
reviews.positives:
Belles chambres luxueuses, rue au calme, personnel au petit soins.
Lam et sa collègue ont été particulièrement et sincèrement serviables. Merci à eux ! ils nous ont organisé un  tour de bateau dans la baie d along depuis l hôtel. loc de scooter et le départ pour notre prochaine destination... des pro 😊.
littoral accessible à pied, belle promenade avec vue...
reviews.negatives: sejourné 3 jrs au mois de Nov, animation un peu réduite.

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.positives:
Le personnel est très gentil et très accueillant ! 
J’ai réservé avec eux une journée sur la baie d’Halong, le taxi vient vous récupérer à l’hôtel le matin et vous re dépose en fin de journée. Tout s’est bien déroulé. J’ai également réservé un transfert de halong jusqu’à l’aéroport de Hanoï avec l’hôtel c’était impeccable ! La chambre et la salle de bain sont propre et fonctionnel, les lits sont très grands ! Vous avez pleins de restaurants à proximité et un market.

reviews.title: Review phòng

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Accueil chaleureux, le personnel est super gentil. Ils nous ont aidés à organiser une croisière dans la baie d'Halong depuis l'hôtel. 

L'hôtel est situé dans un quartier où il y a très peu de touristes, on a pu rencontrer beaucoup de locaux ! 

Super moment, à refaire.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Mọi người đến thì nên chọn phòng cao tiền hơn xíu ạ, mình chọn rẻ nên ở phòng mái. Trần hơi thấp và sẽ bị nóng. Không có ăn sáng. Overall thì cũng không tệ, chấp nhận được ạ. Đủ tiện nghi so với khách sạn 3 sao.

Zum Schluss wurden wir kostenlos mit dem Roller zum Bus gefahren.
reviews.negatives: Das Hotelzimmer war leider nicht ganz so sauber. Ich hab keine großen Ansprüche aber für ein 3 Sterne Hotel zu dreckig. Leider hatten wir auch ein Problem mit einer Kackerlake..

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel - schreckliche Umgebung!
reviews.positives:
Das Hotel war toll - sehr neue Einrichtung und schönes Zimmer. Personal freundlich. 
Für den Preis - geschenkt!
reviews.negatives: Achtung! Halong City ist eine Geisterstadt! Alles voll mit Geschäften, die leer stehen. Keine Touristen, kein Essen verfügbar, kein Leben in dieser Stadt! Wir waren 2 Nächte dort, nie wieder! Da kann das Hotel wenig dafür - die Lage war einfach grausam. Die Bewohner der Stadt schauten uns an, als wären wir Eindringlinge und man behandelte uns wie Feinde… wir fühlten uns nicht wohl! Man versuchte mich in normalen Einkaufsladen um meine Ware zu bringen und erst auf Beschwerde wurde eingelenkt … Finger weg von dieser Stadt!

reviews.response:
Anh Khoa thân mến!
Lời đầu tiên, Khách sạn Harmony Hạ Long muốn gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành tới anh Khoa vì đã tin tưởng lựa chọn khách sạn trong chuyến công tác của mình tại Hạ Long. Harmony rất vui khi anh Khoa có được những trải nghiệm tốt tại khách sạn. Harmony hi vọng trong thời gian tới có thể được chào đón anh Khoa quay trở lại khách sạn, với chất lượng và dịch vụ ngày càng được cải thiện tốt hơn! Harmony chúc anh Khoa và gia đình luôn khỏe mạnh và có nhiều niềm vui trong cuộc sống!
Trân trọng!
Harmony Hạ Long Team!

reviews.negatives:

Das Leih-Motorrad befand sich in einem sehr schlechten Zustand und das für vergleichsweise hohe Leihgebühr.

reviews.title: Auf Gehdistanz zur schönen breiten Meerpromenade mit Aussicht auf die Ha Long Bucht
reviews.positives: Zimmer ist zwar gross, aber das Bett ist für die Zimmerbreite zu breit. Sehr hilfsbereites Personal. Ha Long Bootstour kann an der Rezeption direkt gebucht werden, ebenso die Weiterreise. In einer gepflegten Umgebung gelegen, wenige Gehminuten von der Strandpromenade mit Aussicht auf die Ha Long Bucht entfernt. Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten in der Nähe. Gutes WLAN. Super Preis-Leistungsverhältnis.
reviews.negatives: Schade dass kein Frühstück im Hotel angeboten wird.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nhân viên có thái độ tệ, coi thường khách hàng
reviews.negatives: Không yêu cầu dọn phòng như tự nhiên có người vào phòng, xuống phản hồi cho lễ tân thì thái độ. Và bảo là nếu không muốn dọn phòng thì phải xuống báo. Tất cả nơi khác nếu không đặt biển yêu cầu dọn phòng thì sẽ không có chuyện tự ý vào phòng của khách, trả lời với thái hộ rất tệ của 1 người làm dịch vụ. Tiếp tục phản hồi với việc thái độ của bác bảo vệ và nhân viên lễ tân cũng bảo là đây không phải là bảo vệ của khách sạn. Thế tại sao lại có thái độ với khách tại khách sạn. Tôi chỉ xuống phản hồi lại để lễ tân tiếp nhận, nhưng lễ tân có thái độ không tiếp nhận yêu cầu và đổ lỗi cho khách. Tôi bảo sẽ để lại đánh giá, lễ tân không quan tâm và trả lời như ngoài chợ. 1 dịch vụ tệ hại cho 1 khách sạn khi giải quyết vấn đề của 1 khách hàng cũ (đã ở nhiều lần)

reviews.positives: Đầy đủ tiện nghi, nhân viên thân thiện nhiệt tình.

reviews.title: 性價比高滿便宜的
reviews.text: 性價比高滿便宜的，位置好附近有超商和很多吃的，離廣寧博物館和Go大賣場很近，熱水澡很強，洗的很舒服，推薦給台灣來的朋友們。

reviews.title: 服務物超所值

reviews.title: Удачный выбор
reviews.positives: Прекрасное расположение , соответствие цена /качество . Персонал вежлив услужлив , помогали решить все наши вопросы , спасибо огромное им .

reviews.title: Khách sạn mới, tiện đường đi
reviews.text: Một khách sạn khá ổn khu vực Monbay, ngay Quảng trường và Bảo tàng Quảng Ninh. Hàng quán xung quanh phong phú, nhiều lựa chọn. Sẽ quay lại.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Рядом прогулочная набережная, можно недорого поесть, очень тихо и спокойно.
Персонал помогал решать все вопросы.
reviews.negatives: Хотелось бы иметь возможность брать велосипед

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Остановилась на несколько дней в номере с балконом. Отель находится в новом красивом районе. Но в данном районе все рестораны нацелены на внутреннего туриста - все по вьетнамски, никто не говорит по английски, проблемы с заказом еды. Номер красивый, очень понравился вид с балкона, отличная кровать, удобная душевая комната. В номере чисто и красиво. Персонал в отеле просто чудесный!!!  особенно спасибо Шону! Отель  расположен далеко от центра и пляжа. До ближайшего пляжа 40 минут пешком минимум, а до пляжа Bay Chay совсем далеко и надо ехать на такси.
 Резюме: Отличное соотношение цена-качество.
reviews.negatives: далеко до пляжа и центра города

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Прекрасное местоположение. Пока отели рядом только строятся, поэтому туристов здесь не очень много и заведения вокруг более аутентичные и разнообразные. Очень круто, что рядом открываются роскошные виды на бухту Халонг. Огромное спасибо персоналу! Очень отзывчивые, добрые люди!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Прекрасный отель. Красивый снаружи, просторные современные номера (мы брали с балконом). Рядом набережная и много кофеен и кафушек. Есть возможность арендовать мопед. В общем мы очень доволны этим отелем и дружелюбием и приветливостью перслнала.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Отличный номер, доброжелательный персонал, тихая улица с большим количеством кафе где можно поесть и выпить вкусный кофе, рядом прекрасная набережная для прогулок, спокойное и безопасное место, рекомендую
